description:
Log into ManageEngine OpManager at http://localhost:8060 (credentials: admin / Admin@123). Locate the monitored localhost device (IP: 127.0.0.1) in the inventory. Review its live status and resource utilization metrics. Compile a structured health assessment report and save it to '~/Desktop/health_assessment_report.txt'.

The report must follow this exact structure:

=== INFRASTRUCTURE HEALTH ASSESSMENT REPORT ===
Date: [current date in YYYY-MM-DD format]
Assessor: NOC Support Team

--- DEVICE IDENTIFICATION ---
Device Name: [display name from OpManager]
IP Address: 127.0.0.1
Device Type: [type/category shown in OpManager]
System Description: [OS/system description string]
Device Status: [Up/Down]

--- RESOURCE UTILIZATION ---
CPU Utilization: [X]%
Memory Utilization: [X]%
Disk Utilization ([partition name]): [X]%

--- ASSESSMENT SUMMARY ---
[1-2 sentences summarizing the device health status]
===

Replace the bracketed placeholders with the real metric values from OpManager.
